meta.title: What 150 Gripen Fighters could mean for Ukraine’s future
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Last week, Ukraine signed a Letter of Intent, or LOI, with Sweden to procure between 100 and 150 SAAB Gripen Es, which are advanced 4th-generation fighters that were, in a lot of ways, purpose-built for the type of conflict Ukraine currently finds itself in.
